prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford Duratec 2.3L (engine code: *Duratec-HE MZR L3-VDT*) with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger, forged internals (Mahle pistons, Eagle H-beam rods), and a Cosworth Pectel SQ6M ECU for precise boost control (targeting 350hp at 1.5 bar on 98 RON fuel).
Ohlins TTX40 MkII coilovers with Caterham-specific spring rates (250 lb/in front, 300 lb/in rear) and adjustable damping for track-focused alignment (-2.5° front camber, 0.1° rear toe-out).

AP Racing CP8396-1000 6-piston front brake calipers with 280mm two-piece rotors (floating aluminum hats) and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a Tilton 75-series hydraulic clutch master cylinder for precise pedal feel.
estetica: Custom carbon fiber widebody kit by *Caterham Motorsport* (part #CM-7-WB-001) with integrated side-exit exhaust cutouts for a 3-inch titanium Borla Pro XS system (part #140518).

Polycarbonate windscreen by *MRA* (model #700-001) with a quick-release mounting system and integrated rain guards, paired with a *Sparco R100* carbon fiber racing seat (fixed-back, FIA 8855-1999 certified).
Full *AeroCatch* quick-release hood latches (part #AC-1000) with a custom aluminum hood scoop (Caterham Motorsport part #CM-7-HS-002) for direct Duratec intercooler ducting.
